basic_details.job_title: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT(ISM) Dhanbad) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Maximum age limit is 32 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC, ST, OBC, PH, and Female candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech. in Power Electronics and Drives / Power System Engineering with B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or equivalent. GATE qualified.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Tech. in Power Electronics and Drives / Power System Engineering B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or equivalent GATE qualified Strong background in Power Electronics, Machine Modeling, and control with hands-on hardware experience will be given preference.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- + 20% HRA initially for one year, extendable to SRF with Rs. 42,000/- + 20% HRA.
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000/- + 20% HRA (initially for one year) Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 42,000/- + 20% HRA (extendable subject to satisfactory progress till the end of the project)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirements Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT(ISM) Dhanbad JRF position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT(ISM) Dhanbad is 12th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Tech. in Power Electronics and Drives or Power System Engineering, along with a B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or Electrical & Electronics Engineering or equivalent. GATE qualification is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The initial salary for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) is Rs. 37,000/- plus 20% HRA for one year. This can be extended to Senior Research Fellow (SRF) with a salary of Rs. 42,000/- plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their updated CV and testimonials as a single PDF to the PI at [email protected]. Ensure the subject line is correctly formatted.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based research job at IIT(ISM) Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ANRF/IRG/2024/000792/ENS.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT(ISM) Dhanbad located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad is located in Dhanbad, Jharkhand, with the pincode 826004.
